sizing_rule.note: Derive optimal_f by maximizing Expected Geometric Mean coefficient EGM = (AHPR² - V)^(1/2), balancing win rate and win/loss ratio. Higher win frequency with moderate payoff ratio preferred over low frequency with extreme ratios. Optimal f varies by system; calculate from historical HPR distribution.

source_rule_text: Maximize geometric growth by optimizing the coefficient function EGM = (AHPR² - V)^(1/2), balancing win rate and win/loss ratio rather than pursuing extreme ratios with low probability
